message:
Prevent XML injection in file tag name attributes

File paths containing special XML characters (&, ", <, >) were
interpolated unescaped into <file name="..."> tags, which could produce
malformed XML or allow path-based injection in the conversation context
sent to the model.

- Add escape_file_tag_attribute() to encode &, ", <, >, \n, \r, \t
- Extract helper functions (escaped_file_tag_name, append_file_notice_block,
  append_image_file_ref, append_text_file_block, maybe_append_image_argument)
  that all route through the escaping layer
- Refactor process_file_arguments() to use the new helpers, reducing
  duplicated file-tag formatting logic
- Add test verifying special characters in filenames are properly escaped

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
